Inside Out 2 (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $652,980,194Details
International Box Office $1,045,883,622
Worldwide Box Office $1,698,863,816
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,353,451
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,461,057
Total $8,814,508
Further financial details...

Synopsis

With Riley a newly minted teenager, Headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for something entirely unexpected: new Emotions. Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear and Disgust, who’ve long been running a successful operation by all accounts, aren’t sure how to feel when Anxiety, Envy, Ennui and Embarrassment show up.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$154,201,673 (23.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,440 opening theaters/4,440 max. theaters, 9.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $690,507,789

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 14th, 2024 (Wide) by Walt Disney
June 14th, 2024 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 12th, 2024 (Wide), released as Inside Out 2 (인사이드 아웃 2) (South Korea)
June 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Philippines)
June 12th, 2024 (Wide), released as Alles Steht Kopf 2 (Germany)
June 12th, 2024 (Wide), released as Inside Out 2 (Головоломка 2) (Russia (CIS))
June 12th, 2024 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: August 20th, 2024 by Disney Pixar
MPA Rating: PG for some thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2834 (cert #54895), 5/15/2024)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Inside Out
Filming location (country): United States

Synopsis

With Riley a newly minted teenager, Headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for something entirely unexpected: new Emotions. Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear and Disgust, who’ve long been running a successful operation by all accounts, aren’t sure how to feel when Anxiety, Envy, Ennui and Embarrassment show up.
